title: Revert addition of sv.verbatim.module
body:
- Revert "Fix inout port lowering for sv.verbatim.module (#9209)"
- Revert "Add sv.module.verbatim op and use for firrtl.extmodule with BlackBoxInlineAnno/BlackBoxPathAnno (#9131)"

There are some lingering issues around parameterization that need to be solved before this is landed again. In short, a verbatim module with parameters does not necessarily have a single cannonical port interface/`sv.verbatim.module` that matches all instantiations. If parameters differ between instantiations and those parameters affect the port interface, one needs multiple `ModuleLike` ops to represent each parameterization.
